title: Runtime stack migration — Astro → Go + Vite single binary
description: Capture the framework-rewrite discussion: replace Astro with a Go runtime that embeds the Vite-built frontend bundle, distributed as a single cross-compiled binary. Notes split into architecture (Go runtime, Vite dist embedding, runtime config surface), claude-plugin-upgrade (how documentation-guide evolves once the binary exists), and deployment-methods (CLI / from-source / Docker — lifted from 2026-04-26-framework-as-cli-tool); the original discussion (Q&A on frameworks / architecture / migration / support / triggering issue) lives under brainstorm/04_discuss_stack-and-migration/. Architecture-update notes (2026-06-09) add the structure / layout / theme / shell separation model; subtasks/01 formalizes it. Other implementation subtasks land when the migration is committed.
author: claude
